methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 21 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Red 6 is a Series B+ stage company in Defense & Security that has raised over $100M to date. The valuation landscape for this stage comprises a fragmented universe: 2 public comparables (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private peers including Anduril Industries, Scale AI, Saronic, Flock Safety, and Shield AI. The broader Defense & Security sector contains 21 identifiable peers, though clustering by stage and tier yields insufficient depth for robust median analysis.

Peer-median triangulation is not applicable in this instance. The Defense & Security sector lacks sufficient same-stage and adjacent-stage comparables—specifically, zero peers satisfied the filters for same-stage, zero for adjacent-stage, and zero for similar valuation tier. A threshold of at least three datapoints is required for reliable median estimation; falling back to all-sector medians would introduce material distortion given the dispersion in business model, maturity, and market positioning across the broader peer set.

The analysis is consequently limited by data scarcity. While the identified public and private peers provide directional context for the frontier-defense segment, no quantitative range can be derived from the methodologies applied here. Further work would require either expansion of the comparable set through deeper sourcing, or reliance on alternative approaches (scenario DCF, precedent transaction analysis, or venture method calibration) not yet populated in this dataset. Key uncertainty remains the appropriate valuation multiple or stage-adjusted multiple for this maturity and capital intensity profile.
